products.title: AI Prompt Vault — 48 PMT Prompts
products.headline: Better AI output, less prompt-engineering
products.description: 48 production-ready AI prompts across writing, social, copywriting, code, image generation, and customer service — fill in, paste into your AI tool. Zero setup required.

products.title: Reddit to Shorts Content Lab
products.headline: Turn any viral thread into YouTube Shorts or TikTok
products.description: Script templates, TTS prompts, B-roll matrix, scoring rubric, and legal notes for turning viral Reddit threads into short-form video. Subreddit-tuned.

products.title: Creator Calendar 2026 — 12 Month OS
